macros.rationale: Protein: 2.5 g/kg lean mass (cutting, BF% known, omnivore). Fat: ~20% of calories (diet-mode aware; no somatotype tweak). Carbs: remainder of calorie budget unless constrained by diet mode (omnivore).

recommendations: Plan is usable; continue improving fibre metadata and rotate recipe sources for adherence.

weekly_meal_plan.name: 7-day omnivore protocol meal plan

meals.name: Sundried Tomato & Herb Scrambled Egg Grilled Cheese Recipe
ingredients: 2 tbsp chopped Sun Dried Tomato (not in oil)
2 slices Ezekiel Bread or bread of choice
meals.recipe:
Whisk together egg, egg whites, salt and pepper
Add in sun dried tomatoes
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat
Scramble eggs until cooked through
Place eggs onto 1 slice of bread
Top with cheese
Place sandwich into skillet and cook until golden
Flip and cook until cheese is melted

meals.name: High Protein Chicken Burrito Bowl Recipe
ingredients: 1/3 cup no salt added black beans
1/2 cup fresh pico de gallo or salsa
meals.recipe:
Toss cooked white rice with chopped cilantro, squeeze of lime juice and a pinch of salt
Toss chicken breast with your favorite Mexican seasoning and bake or grill as desired
Once chicken is done cooking, cut into bite size pieces
Warm your black beans in the microwave
Build your bowl - divide all ingredients between 2 bowls
Layer cilantro lime rice, shredded lettuce, chicken, beans, guacamole, pico de gallo, greek yogurt
Finish off with a sprinkle of cheddar cheese and a wedge of lime

meals.name: Grilled Skirt Steak And Poblano Fajitas Recipe
meals.recipe:
Core and mash avocados, add 0.75 tsp salt, 0.25 tsp pepper, cilantro and 2 tbsp lime juice to make guacamole
Brush onion and peppers with 2 tsp olive oil
Coat steak with remaining 1 tsp olive oil and spice rub (ancho chile, cumin, salt, pepper)
Grill poblano peppers and onion 8-10 minutes, turning often
Grill steak 2-3 minutes per side for medium rare
Let steak rest under foil while slicing onion and peeling and slicing peppers
Toss onion and pepper with 1 tbsp lime juice and 0.25 tsp salt
Slice steak and serve with veggies, guacamole, hot sauce and corn tortillas

meals.name: Bodybuilders Lean Beef Enchiladas Recipes
ingredients: 0.25 cup no salt added black beans, drained and rinsed
0.25 cup red or green enchilada sauce
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
In a skillet over medium heat, saute ground beef until cooked
Add diced chiles, salt and pepper
Transfer meat to a bowl and add in beans
Spread half the enchilada sauce on bottom of an oven safe dish
Divide the meat and bean mixture evenly down the middle of the 3 tortillas
Sprinkle with half the cheese
Roll up tightly and place seam side down in the dish
Spread remaining enchilada sauce on top
Sprinkle with remaining cheese
Bake for 10-12 minutes

meals.name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Chip Protein French Toast Recipe
meals.recipe:
Preheat pan or griddle to medium/high heat
Whisk together egg, protein powder, cinnamon, and milk
Soak each slice of bread in egg mixture on each side
Cook french toast on each side about 3 minutes or until golden brown
Heat peanut butter until melty
Drizzle over french toast and sprinkle with mini chocolate chips

meals.name: Damien's Cheap Chili Recipe
meals.recipe:
Finely chop garlic, cut onions into slivers and finely chop red pepper
Cook all meat in large deep saucepan until dark brown, stirring constantly
Move meat to large deep pot, add olive oil, garlic and onion, cook until onion is soft
Add can of chopped tomatoes and salsa and simmer 10 minutes until sauce thickens
Add finely chopped peppers and can of corn kernels
Add chili powder to taste and simmer 20-50 mins

meals.name: Shrimp Stuffed Avocado Recipe
ingredients: 1 oz of Bolthouse Farms Cilantro Avocado Dressing
meals.recipe:
First, cut both avocados in half and remove the pit. Using a spoon, cut out additional avocado in the center to make room for more shrimp.
Heat up the Trifecta Shrimp for 2 minutes in the microwave.
Cut up the shrimp into pieces and add into the center of the avocados. Top with diced Roma tomatoes, diced jalapenos, and drizzle lightly with the Bolthouse Farms dressing.
Top with fresh cilantro. Enjoy!

meals.name: Protein Packed Grilled Steak Burrito Recipe
ingredients: 0.5 cup no salt black beans, drained
meals.recipe:
Season steak with salt and pepper
Grill steak until desired doneness
Cook brown rice according to package directions
When rice is done, add in pico de gallo and black beans
Layer bean and rice mixture down center of tortilla
Top with sliced steak
Finish off with a dollop of greek yogurt and cheese or avocado if desired
Roll up and enjoy

meals.name: Kurt Weidner's Sweet Potato Waffles Recipe
meals.recipe:
Add all ingredients into a blender
Blend until smooth
Pour mixture into a waffle maker, heat and serve

meals.name: Bodybuilder's Double Beef & Bacon Cheeseburger Recipe
ingredients: 1 slice Reduced Fat White Cheddar Cheese
meals.recipe:
Combine ground beef and liquid smoke
Form beef into two even sized patties
Grill until about 1 minute before desired doneness
Add half slice of cheese to each burger and allow to melt
Cook bacon as desired
Place one burger on bottom of roll, followed by bacon, then remaining burger
Add condiments such as lettuce, tomato, ketchup, mustard, relish if desired

meals.name: Lime BBQ Chicken With Salsa Cream Dipping Sauce Recipe
meals.recipe:
Cube chicken
Place cilantro, minced garlic, lime zest, lime juice, olive oil, salt and pepper into a bowl and stir
Place cubed chicken into marinade, cover and refrigerate 30-60 minutes maximum (citrus starts breaking down protein after 60 minutes)
Combine 1 cup sour cream with 1 cup salsa for dipping sauce
Place chicken on 8 skewers and cook on grill
Serve with salsa cream dipping sauce

meals.name: Ethiopian Venison Stew
ingredients: 2 large onions, peeled and sliced thin root to tip
2 to 3 tablespoons niter kebbeh (spiced butter), (or clarified butter)
1 1/2 pounds diced venison, beef, lamb or goat
6 Yukon Gold potatoes, (peeled and cut in chunks)
meals.recipe:
If you are making the Mekelesha spice mix, mix them all together in a little bowl and set aside.
Arrange the sliced onions in a large, lidded pot like a Dutch oven and turn the heat to medium. Sweat the onions, dry, until they are starting to brown and soft, about 10 minutes. You will need to stir them from time to time.
When the onions are soft, add the spiced butter and the garlic and stir well. Let this cook another 4 to 6 minutes.
Mix in the cumin, berbere, fenugreek and tomato and cook 3 minutes, stirring often. Add the diced venison.
Pour in the broth, little by little, stirring to incorporate everything well. Bring to a simmer, add salt to taste, and cover. Let this cook gently for 1 hour.
Add the potatoes, cover and cook another hour. When the venison and potatoes are tender, add the mekelesha spice, if using, adjust for salt and pepper and serve with bread or rice.

meals.name: Spicy Scrambled Eggs Recipe
ingredients: 2 large whole eggs and 4 egg whites
meals.recipe:
Spray a small non-stick frying pan with olive oil cooking spray
Whisk eggs, onion, garlic, chilli, cottage cheese and herbs together in a bowl
Add to moderately heated frying pan and gently stir to scramble
Serve on toast

meals.name: Crock Pot Turkey Meat Balls With Green Peppers Recipe
ingredients: Cajun seasoning, black pepper, garlic salt to taste
meals.recipe:
Cook cauliflower in microwave until very tender, chop into fine pieces and set aside
Thaw green peppers in microwave and set aside
Mix turkey, eggs, coconut flour, Worcestershire sauce, pepper and seasonings
Roll meatballs about the size of a golf ball
Cover bottom of crock pot with meatballs, layer green peppers and cauliflower on them
Continue layering meatballs and pepper and cauliflower mix
Chop cranberry sauce and distribute over meatballs, pour chili sauce over everything
Cover and cook on high for 6-7 hours

meals.name: Chocolate And Peanut Butter Protein Bars Recipe
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Place oats in blender and pulse until flour-like texture
Mix oat flour, cinnamon and chocolate whey protein in a bowl
Add peanut butter and mix thoroughly
Mash bananas and add with honey and egg whites, mix well
Add skim milk and mix again
Pour batter into greased 9x9 or 9x13 baking pan
Bake 15-20 minutes until toothpick comes out clean
Allow to cool and cut into 6 bars

meals.name: Protein Packed Sweet Potato Shepherds Pie
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Add ground beef to a non stick skillet
Cook over medium heat
Once cooked, add in tomato paste, frozen veggies and seasonings as desired
Place mixture into a 9x13in oven safe dish
Spread mashed sweet potatoes over top
Sprinkle with paprika, if desired
Bake for approximately 35-40 minutes
Serve immediately

meals.name: Hearty Pumpkin Spice Protein Waffles Recipe
ingredients: 2 scoops snickerdoodle or vanilla whey protein powder
Additional Pumpkin Pie Spice as desired
meals.recipe:
Mix together all ingredients except syrup in a bowl
Allow batter to sit while waffle iron warms
Spray waffle iron with nonstick spray
Cook according to waffle iron directions

meals.name: Doro Wat (Ethiopian Spiced Chicken)
ingredients: 3 lbs chicken thighs (, cut into 1 inch pieces, or 3 chicken breasts, cut into 1/2 inch pieces)
1/2 cup Tej (Ethiopian honey wine) ((alternatively you can substitute white wine mixed with 1 teaspoon honey))
4 hard-boiled eggs (, pierced all over with fork about 1/4 inch deep)
meals.recipe:
Place the onions in a food processor and finely mince them to a chunky puree. Set aside.Place the chicken pieces in a bowl and pour lemon juice over. Let sit at room temperature for at least 30 minutes.
Heat the niter kibbeh or butter along with the olive oil in a Dutch oven or heavy pot. Add the onions and saute, covered, over low heat for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.Add the garlic, ginger, and 1 tablespoon butter and continue to saute, covered, for another 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the berbere and the 2 remaining tablespoons of butter and saute, covered, over low heat for another 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.Add the chicken, broth, salt and wine and bring to a boil....
Half or quarter the eggs and arrange on the plates with the stew. Serve hot with injera, bread or rice.

meals.name: Scallop Cerviche Recipe
ingredients: Juice of 6 limes, enough to cover scallops
meals.recipe:
Put the scallops into a shallow bowl and squeeze lime juice over them
Cover and refrigerate for 4-8 hours (overnight is fine)
The acid from the limes cooks the scallops in a process called ceviche
After soaking, remove scallops and drain off most of the remaining lime juice
Dice the onion, tomato, and celery, and add to the scallops
Add capers, salt, olive oil and pepper
Refrigerate for another hour and serve cold

meals.name: Ethiopian Alicha Wot
ingredients: 2 pounds venison stew meat, (trimmed of silverskin)

meals.name: Paleo Spiced Roasted Butternut Squash Recipe
ingredients: 1 whole butternut squash, stems removed, peeled, and seeded
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 450F. Cut both ends, peel the butternut squash, and seed it. Discard skin and seeds. Cut the squash into small evenly-sized rectangles and transfer to a sheet tray lined with foil.
Mix the spice mix, including the salt, in a small bowl. Season the butternut squash liberally with the spice mix and add the oil. Mix with hands to fully incorporate.
Roast in the preheated oven for 35 minutes. Pierce with a fork to test doneness. There should be no resistance. If there is, add 10 minutes and continue roasting.
Remove from oven, cool down and store in an airtight container, or serve 3 oz per dish for exact macros. Conversely, if you are serving this for dinner, serve immediately with your preferred protein and paleo vegetables.

meals.name: Scrambled Eggs With Cheese Recipe
ingredients: 30 grams of shredded low fat mozzarella cheese
meals.recipe:
Whisk whole eggs and egg whites in a large mixing bowl
In a small frying pan cook onion and mushrooms until soft
Remove onions and mushrooms and add to the egg mix
Add all other ingredients except shredded cheese
Mix ingredients then add to moderately heated frying pan with olive oil
Stir gently to scramble the eggs
Cook until eggs are done to your liking
Serve on a large plate and sprinkle shredded cheese over the top

meals.name: High Protein Sriracha Chicken Cheese Fries Recipe
ingredients: 4 medium white or sweet potatoes, cut as desired
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 425 degrees
Coat oven safe pan with nonstick spray
Add potato slices to pan
Bake for approximately 20 minutes
While potatoes are baking, boil chicken until cooked through
Shred cooked chicken
Toss chicken with sriracha sauce
Remove fries from oven
Top with shredded chicken and cheese
Place back in oven about 6-7 minutes until cheese melts
Top with chives if desired

meals.name: Honey Sriracha Turkey Meatballs
ingredients: 1/4 Cup of Pineapple (not for the inside of the meatballs)
meals.recipe:
In a large bowl, mix all of the ingredients for the turkey meatballs.
Roll meatballs into 1-inch balls. Place off to the side when rolled.
Heat up a skillet over medium. Grill the turkey meatballs on all sides, until each side is slightly browned. (Cover the skillet for 1-2 minutes to cook the inside of the meatballs before removing from heat).
In a small bowl, mix all of the ingredients for the sauce.
Dip the cooked meatballs into the sauce until thoroughly glazed in sauce.
Pair the meatballs with brown rice. Add in the pineapple. Top with sesame seeds and green onions. Add a lime for additional flavor.

meals.name: Easy Beefy Flatbread Recipe
ingredients: ½ cup store-bought slaw mix or thinly sliced cabbage (use a mandolin)
meals.recipe:
Preheat toaster oven or larger oven to 350F. Slightly toast the flatbreads to help them keep their bodies and avoid becoming soggy while constructing them. Spray a sheet tray with oil and spread all four flatbreads on the tray, making sure they are not overlapping each other. Toast for 3 minutes, keeping an eye on the flatbreads. Remove from the oven carefully. Keep oven on.
Microwave the Trifecta beef patties covered completely by a damp paper cloth towel, for a minute and a half. Remove from microwave and after the patties are slightly cooled down, crumble the patties to its original form - ground beef - with your hands into a separate bowl. Keep warm.
Spread 1 tablespoon of pesto on top of each flatbread.
Divide ¼ cup of arugula and ¼ cup of Trifecta mushrooms on top of each flatbread, sprinkling around.
Similarly, sprinkle 4 ounces of the crumbled beef on each flatbread. Finish by dividing the 1 ounce of crumbled gorgonzola cheese evenly into all 4 flatbreads (¼ ounce on each).
Return built flatbreads to the sheet tray used to toast the flatbreads, and bake in the oven for 3-5 minutes, or until cheese is melted. Cut into quarters and enjoy!

meals.name: Protein Pumpkin Pancakes With Oats Recipe
ingredients: Topping: 2 tsp peanut flour mixed with water until syrupy
meals.recipe:
Blend the eggs, protein powder, oats and pumpkin together until smooth
Cook like pancakes on a nonstick griddle over medium heat
Flip when bubbles form on surface
Mix peanut flour with water to make syrupy topping
Serve topped with peanut flour syrup

meals.name: Deep Dish Pepperoni Pizza Lasagna Recipe
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Combine cottage cheese, eggs, and pizza seasoning in a bowl, mix until creamy and smooth
Spread 1/4 cup pizza sauce on bottom of 9x13 baking dish
Layer 3 noodles on top of sauce
Evenly spread 1/3 of cottage cheese mixture on noodles
Spread sauce on top, sprinkle 1/4 of shredded cheese, layer 1/3 ground turkey and 1/3 pepperoni
Repeat layers two more times
Finish with remaining mozzarella
Cover and bake for 30 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbly

meals.name: Jen Jewell's Bikini Booty Protein Smoothie Recipe
ingredients: 1 serving greens supplement or 2 cups spinach
meals.recipe:
Add protein powder to blender
Add greens supplement or spinach
Add chia seeds
Add frozen raspberries
Add almond milk
Blend for 5-10 seconds and enjoy!

meals.name: Tibs, Ethiopian Stir-Fried Beef or Venison
ingredients: 1 large red onion, (about 2 cups, sliced thin)
1/4 cup niter kebbeh or ghee (spiced butter)
2 pounds venison, (lamb or beef, cut into bite-sized pieces)
2 cups whole (peeled tomatoes, broken into bits)
1 to 5 green chiles, (such as jalapenos or serranos)
meals.recipe:
Get the saute pan or wok very hot. Stir-fry the onions without the butter for a few minutes, until they char just a little on the outside. Add the spiced butter and the venison. Stir-fry hot and fast until the outside of the meat is brown but the inside of the meat is still very rare. You need to do this on as hot a burner as you have. Do it in two batches unless you have a very large wok or pan.
The moment the meat has browned, add it all back into the pan along with the spices, garlic and chiles. Stir-fry another 30 seconds or so, then add the tomatoes and the wine. Toss to combine and let this cook for a minute or two. Serve at once with bread or injera.

target_macros.rationale: Protein: 2.5 g/kg lean mass (cutting, BF% known, omnivore). Fat: ~20% of calories (diet-mode aware; no somatotype tweak). Carbs: remainder of calorie budget unless constrained by diet mode (omnivore).

water_guidance: Aim to be peeing clear by noon.
Have five clear urinations a day.
Don't be dehydrated at the time of your workouts.
Taper water toward the end of the day so you don't wake to pee.

protocol_notes: Calories are matched by portion scaling at the day level.
Protein is scored during meal selection, but add a lean protein side if a day falls short.
Diet/allergen filters are hard constraints; cuisine preference is a soft adherence preference.
Use weekly average adherence, weight, and measurements before changing calories.
Fruit/veg target: 3 cups fruit and 3 cups vegetables daily; fibre target ~31 g/day.

alternatives.name: Grilled Skirt Steak And Poblano Fajitas Recipe

Brush onion and peppers with 2 tsp olive oil

Grill poblano peppers and onion 8-10 minutes, turning often

alternatives.name: Scallop Cerviche Recipe

Put the scallops into a shallow bowl and squeeze lime juice over them
Cover and refrigerate for 4-8 hours (overnight is fine)
The acid from the limes cooks the scallops in a process called ceviche
After soaking, remove scallops and drain off most of the remaining lime juice
Dice the onion, tomato, and celery, and add to the scallops
Add capers, salt, olive oil and pepper
Refrigerate for another hour and serve cold

alternatives.name: Bodybuilders Lean Beef Enchiladas Recipes
ingredients: 0.25 cup no salt added black beans, drained and rinsed
0.25 cup red or green enchilada sauce
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
In a skillet over medium heat, saute ground beef until cooked
Add diced chiles, salt and pepper
Transfer meat to a bowl and add in beans
Spread half the enchilada sauce on bottom of an oven safe dish
Divide the meat and bean mixture evenly down the middle of the 3 tortillas

Roll up tightly and place seam side down in the dish
Spread remaining enchilada sauce on top
Sprinkle with remaining cheese
Bake for 10-12 minutes

alternatives.name: Protein Packed Sweet Potato Shepherds Pie
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Add ground beef to a non stick skillet
Cook over medium heat
Once cooked, add in tomato paste, frozen veggies and seasonings as desired
Place mixture into a 9x13in oven safe dish
Spread mashed sweet potatoes over top
Sprinkle with paprika, if desired
Bake for approximately 35-40 minutes
Serve immediately

alternatives.name: Ethiopian Venison Stew
ingredients: 2 large onions, peeled and sliced thin root to tip
2 to 3 tablespoons niter kebbeh (spiced butter), (or clarified butter)
1 1/2 pounds diced venison, beef, lamb or goat
6 Yukon Gold potatoes, (peeled and cut in chunks)
alternatives.recipe:
If you are making the Mekelesha spice mix, mix them all together in a little bowl and set aside.
Arrange the sliced onions in a large, lidded pot like a Dutch oven and turn the heat to medium. Sweat the onions, dry, until they are starting to brown and soft, about 10 minutes. You will need to stir them from time to time.
When the onions are soft, add the spiced butter and the garlic and stir well. Let this cook another 4 to 6 minutes.
Mix in the cumin, berbere, fenugreek and tomato and cook 3 minutes, stirring often. Add the diced venison.
Pour in the broth, little by little, stirring to incorporate everything well. Bring to a simmer, add salt to taste, and cover. Let this cook gently for 1 hour.
Add the potatoes, cover and cook another hour. When the venison and potatoes are tender, add the mekelesha spice, if using, adjust for salt and pepper and serve with bread or rice.

alternatives.selected: Kurt Weidner's Sweet Potato Waffles Recipe

alternatives.name: Protein Pumpkin Pancakes With Oats Recipe
ingredients: Topping: 2 tsp peanut flour mixed with water until syrupy
alternatives.recipe:
Blend the eggs, protein powder, oats and pumpkin together until smooth
Cook like pancakes on a nonstick griddle over medium heat
Flip when bubbles form on surface
Mix peanut flour with water to make syrupy topping
Serve topped with peanut flour syrup

alternatives.name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Chip Protein French Toast Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat pan or griddle to medium/high heat
Whisk together egg, protein powder, cinnamon, and milk
Soak each slice of bread in egg mixture on each side
Cook french toast on each side about 3 minutes or until golden brown
Heat peanut butter until melty
Drizzle over french toast and sprinkle with mini chocolate chips

alternatives.name: Sundried Tomato & Herb Scrambled Egg Grilled Cheese Recipe
ingredients: 2 tbsp chopped Sun Dried Tomato (not in oil)
2 slices Ezekiel Bread or bread of choice
alternatives.recipe:
Whisk together egg, egg whites, salt and pepper
Add in sun dried tomatoes
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat
Scramble eggs until cooked through
Place eggs onto 1 slice of bread
Top with cheese
Place sandwich into skillet and cook until golden
Flip and cook until cheese is melted

alternatives.selected: Bodybuilder's Double Beef & Bacon Cheeseburger Recipe

alternatives.name: Damien's Cheap Chili Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Finely chop garlic, cut onions into slivers and finely chop red pepper
Cook all meat in large deep saucepan until dark brown, stirring constantly
Move meat to large deep pot, add olive oil, garlic and onion, cook until onion is soft
Add can of chopped tomatoes and salsa and simmer 10 minutes until sauce thickens
Add finely chopped peppers and can of corn kernels
Add chili powder to taste and simmer 20-50 mins

alternatives.name: Crock Pot Turkey Meat Balls With Green Peppers Recipe
ingredients: Cajun seasoning, black pepper, garlic salt to taste
alternatives.recipe:
Cook cauliflower in microwave until very tender, chop into fine pieces and set aside
Thaw green peppers in microwave and set aside
Mix turkey, eggs, coconut flour, Worcestershire sauce, pepper and seasonings
Roll meatballs about the size of a golf ball
Cover bottom of crock pot with meatballs, layer green peppers and cauliflower on them
Continue layering meatballs and pepper and cauliflower mix
Chop cranberry sauce and distribute over meatballs, pour chili sauce over everything
Cover and cook on high for 6-7 hours

alternatives.name: High Protein Chicken Burrito Bowl Recipe
ingredients: 1/3 cup no salt added black beans
1/2 cup fresh pico de gallo or salsa
alternatives.recipe:
Toss cooked white rice with chopped cilantro, squeeze of lime juice and a pinch of salt
Toss chicken breast with your favorite Mexican seasoning and bake or grill as desired
Once chicken is done cooking, cut into bite size pieces
Warm your black beans in the microwave
Build your bowl - divide all ingredients between 2 bowls
Layer cilantro lime rice, shredded lettuce, chicken, beans, guacamole, pico de gallo, greek yogurt
Finish off with a sprinkle of cheddar cheese and a wedge of lime

alternatives.selected: Lime BBQ Chicken With Salsa Cream Dipping Sauce Recipe

alternatives.name: Shrimp Stuffed Avocado Recipe
ingredients: 1 oz of Bolthouse Farms Cilantro Avocado Dressing
alternatives.recipe:
First, cut both avocados in half and remove the pit. Using a spoon, cut out additional avocado in the center to make room for more shrimp.
Heat up the Trifecta Shrimp for 2 minutes in the microwave.
Cut up the shrimp into pieces and add into the center of the avocados. Top with diced Roma tomatoes, diced jalapenos, and drizzle lightly with the Bolthouse Farms dressing.
Top with fresh cilantro. Enjoy!

alternatives.name: Grilled Skirt Steak And Poblano Fajitas Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Core and mash avocados, add 0.75 tsp salt, 0.25 tsp pepper, cilantro and 2 tbsp lime juice to make guacamole
Brush onion and peppers with 2 tsp olive oil
Coat steak with remaining 1 tsp olive oil and spice rub (ancho chile, cumin, salt, pepper)
Grill poblano peppers and onion 8-10 minutes, turning often
Grill steak 2-3 minutes per side for medium rare
Let steak rest under foil while slicing onion and peeling and slicing peppers
Toss onion and pepper with 1 tbsp lime juice and 0.25 tsp salt
Slice steak and serve with veggies, guacamole, hot sauce and corn tortillas

alternatives.name: BBQ Chicken Sweet Potato Toast
alternatives.recipe:
First, Heat the sweet potatoes up in the microwave for about 5 minutes (each potato).
Using two forks try and shred the chicken up as much as possible. Also, dice the onions.
In a bowl, mix together the chicken, onions, and BBQ Sauce.
Once the potatoes have cooled. Cut into strips (hot dog style) to use as the base of the toast. Using a skillet, grill the sweet potatoes until golden brown. Add the mozzarella cheese to the top of the toast and let melt.
Add the chicken/onion mixture to the top of the toast.
Top with fresh cilantro. Enjoy!

alternatives.selected: Ethiopian Venison Stew

alternatives.name: Bodybuilders Lean Beef Enchiladas Recipes
ingredients: 0.25 cup no salt added black beans, drained and rinsed
0.25 cup red or green enchilada sauce
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
In a skillet over medium heat, saute ground beef until cooked
Add diced chiles, salt and pepper
Transfer meat to a bowl and add in beans
Spread half the enchilada sauce on bottom of an oven safe dish
Divide the meat and bean mixture evenly down the middle of the 3 tortillas
Sprinkle with half the cheese
Roll up tightly and place seam side down in the dish
Spread remaining enchilada sauce on top
Sprinkle with remaining cheese
Bake for 10-12 minutes

alternatives.name: Protein Packed Sweet Potato Shepherds Pie
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Add ground beef to a non stick skillet
Cook over medium heat
Once cooked, add in tomato paste, frozen veggies and seasonings as desired
Place mixture into a 9x13in oven safe dish
Spread mashed sweet potatoes over top
Sprinkle with paprika, if desired
Bake for approximately 35-40 minutes
Serve immediately

alternatives.name: Ethiopian Alicha Wot
ingredients: 2 pounds venison stew meat, (trimmed of silverskin)

alternatives.selected: Spicy Scrambled Eggs Recipe

alternatives.name: High Protein Cheeseburger Omelette Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Whisk together eggs and eggwhites
Heat a skillet over medium heat
Add eggs to skillet and cover pan with aluminum foil
Cook until desired doneness
In a second skillet, cook ground beef with salt & pepper
Spread cooked ground beef on one side of eggs
Top ground beef with tomato and pickle
Fold eggs over beef
Sprinkle with cheese
Cook until cheese is slightly melted
Finish off with ketchup and serve

alternatives.name: High Protein Breakfast Banana Split Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Evenly divide greek yogurt into 3 separate bowls
Mix chocolate protein powder with yogurt in one bowl
Mix strawberry protein powder with yogurt in second bowl
Mix vanilla protein powder with yogurt in third bowl
Place each bowl in freezer for 20 minutes
Slice banana in half lengthwise
Remove yogurt from freezer and give each bowl a good mix
Assemble each flavor of yogurt on top of the banana
Finish off with strawberries, pineapple, whipped topping, walnuts, chocolate sauce and cherry

alternatives.name: Sundried Tomato & Herb Scrambled Egg Grilled Cheese Recipe
ingredients: 2 tbsp chopped Sun Dried Tomato (not in oil)
2 slices Ezekiel Bread or bread of choice
alternatives.recipe:
Whisk together egg, egg whites, salt and pepper
Add in sun dried tomatoes
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat
Scramble eggs until cooked through
Place eggs onto 1 slice of bread
Top with cheese
Place sandwich into skillet and cook until golden
Flip and cook until cheese is melted

alternatives.selected: Crock Pot Turkey Meat Balls With Green Peppers Recipe

alternatives.name: Damien's Cheap Chili Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Finely chop garlic, cut onions into slivers and finely chop red pepper
Cook all meat in large deep saucepan until dark brown, stirring constantly
Move meat to large deep pot, add olive oil, garlic and onion, cook until onion is soft
Add can of chopped tomatoes and salsa and simmer 10 minutes until sauce thickens
Add finely chopped peppers and can of corn kernels
Add chili powder to taste and simmer 20-50 mins

alternatives.name: Bodybuilder's Double Beef & Bacon Cheeseburger Recipe
ingredients: 1 slice Reduced Fat White Cheddar Cheese
alternatives.recipe:
Combine ground beef and liquid smoke
Form beef into two even sized patties
Grill until about 1 minute before desired doneness
Add half slice of cheese to each burger and allow to melt
Cook bacon as desired
Place one burger on bottom of roll, followed by bacon, then remaining burger
Add condiments such as lettuce, tomato, ketchup, mustard, relish if desired

alternatives.name: High Protein Cheesy Steak Pizza Recipe
ingredients: 1 cup reduced fat shredded mozzarella cheese
alternatives.recipe:
Slice steak into thin strips and grill or saute until desired doneness
Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and place pizza crust on top
Top crust with pizza sauce, half the cheese, peppers, onions, and grilled steak
Finish with remaining cheese
Bake for about 15 minutes until golden and bubbly
Allow to cool slightly, slice and serve

alternatives.selected: Chocolate And Peanut Butter Protein Bars Recipe

alternatives.name: Grilled Skirt Steak And Poblano Fajitas Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Core and mash avocados, add 0.75 tsp salt, 0.25 tsp pepper, cilantro and 2 tbsp lime juice to make guacamole
Brush onion and peppers with 2 tsp olive oil
Coat steak with remaining 1 tsp olive oil and spice rub (ancho chile, cumin, salt, pepper)
Grill poblano peppers and onion 8-10 minutes, turning often
Grill steak 2-3 minutes per side for medium rare
Let steak rest under foil while slicing onion and peeling and slicing peppers
Toss onion and pepper with 1 tbsp lime juice and 0.25 tsp salt
Slice steak and serve with veggies, guacamole, hot sauce and corn tortillas

alternatives.name: Honey BBQ Slow Cooker Chicken Wings Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 450 degrees
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper, place chicken wings on sheet and cook 10 minutes
While baking, spray slow cooker with nonstick spray, add half the BBQ sauce to the bottom
When wings are done, add to slow cooker, top with remaining BBQ sauce
Cook on high heat 2-3 hours or low heat 4-5 hours
Mix together cornstarch and water, 15 minutes before wings are done add cornstarch mixture and toss to coat
Allow the wings to finish cooking and the sauce to thicken
Serve piping hot

alternatives.name: Shrimp Stuffed Avocado Recipe
ingredients: 1 oz of Bolthouse Farms Cilantro Avocado Dressing
alternatives.recipe:
First, cut both avocados in half and remove the pit. Using a spoon, cut out additional avocado in the center to make room for more shrimp.

Cut up the shrimp into pieces and add into the center of the avocados. Top with diced Roma tomatoes, diced jalapenos, and drizzle lightly with the Bolthouse Farms dressing.
Top with fresh cilantro. Enjoy!

alternatives.name: Bodybuilders Lean Beef Enchiladas Recipes
ingredients: 0.25 cup no salt added black beans, drained and rinsed
0.25 cup red or green enchilada sauce
alternatives.recipe:

Roll up tightly and place seam side down in the dish
Spread remaining enchilada sauce on top
Sprinkle with remaining cheese
Bake for 10-12 minutes

alternatives.name: High Protein Sriracha Chicken Cheese Fries Recipe
ingredients: 4 medium white or sweet potatoes, cut as desired
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 425 degrees
Coat oven safe pan with nonstick spray
Add potato slices to pan
Bake for approximately 20 minutes
While potatoes are baking, boil chicken until cooked through
Shred cooked chicken
Toss chicken with sriracha sauce
Remove fries from oven
Top with shredded chicken and cheese
Place back in oven about 6-7 minutes until cheese melts
Top with chives if desired

alternatives.name: Tibs, Ethiopian Stir-Fried Beef or Venison
ingredients: 1 large red onion, (about 2 cups, sliced thin)
1/4 cup niter kebbeh or ghee (spiced butter)
2 pounds venison, (lamb or beef, cut into bite-sized pieces)
2 cups whole (peeled tomatoes, broken into bits)
1 to 5 green chiles, (such as jalapenos or serranos)
alternatives.recipe:
Get the saute pan or wok very hot. Stir-fry the onions without the butter for a few minutes, until they char just a little on the outside. Add the spiced butter and the venison. Stir-fry hot and fast until the outside of the meat is brown but the inside of the meat is still very rare. You need to do this on as hot a burner as you have. Do it in two batches unless you have a very large wok or pan.
The moment the meat has browned, add it all back into the pan along with the spices, garlic and chiles. Stir-fry another 30 seconds or so, then add the tomatoes and the wine. Toss to combine and let this cook for a minute or two. Serve at once with bread or injera.

alternatives.selected: Hearty Pumpkin Spice Protein Waffles Recipe

alternatives.name: Scrambled Eggs With Cheese Recipe
ingredients: 30 grams of shredded low fat mozzarella cheese
alternatives.recipe:
Whisk whole eggs and egg whites in a large mixing bowl
In a small frying pan cook onion and mushrooms until soft
Remove onions and mushrooms and add to the egg mix
Add all other ingredients except shredded cheese
Mix ingredients then add to moderately heated frying pan with olive oil
Stir gently to scramble the eggs
Cook until eggs are done to your liking
Serve on a large plate and sprinkle shredded cheese over the top

alternatives.name: Sundried Tomato & Herb Scrambled Egg Grilled Cheese Recipe
ingredients: 2 tbsp chopped Sun Dried Tomato (not in oil)
2 slices Ezekiel Bread or bread of choice
alternatives.recipe:
Whisk together egg, egg whites, salt and pepper
Add in sun dried tomatoes
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat
Scramble eggs until cooked through
Place eggs onto 1 slice of bread
Top with cheese
Place sandwich into skillet and cook until golden
Flip and cook until cheese is melted

alternatives.name: High Protein Cheeseburger Omelette Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Whisk together eggs and eggwhites
Heat a skillet over medium heat
Add eggs to skillet and cover pan with aluminum foil
Cook until desired doneness
In a second skillet, cook ground beef with salt & pepper
Spread cooked ground beef on one side of eggs
Top ground beef with tomato and pickle
Fold eggs over beef
Sprinkle with cheese
Cook until cheese is slightly melted
Finish off with ketchup and serve

alternatives.selected: Doro Wat (Ethiopian Spiced Chicken)

alternatives.name: Grilled Sausage and Turkey Flatbread Pizza Recipe
ingredients: 0.25 cup assorted colored bell peppers, sliced
alternatives.recipe:
Heat grill to around 300 degrees
Place each flatbread top side down and grill until crispy
While bread is grilling, cook ground turkey breast in a skillet until cooked through
Once bread is crispy, flip over and top each flatbread with half the sauce, ground turkey, sausage, bell peppers and cheese
Close grill cover and continue to grill until cheese is melted
Enjoy right away!

alternatives.name: Chicken Burrito Bowl Recipe
ingredients: Fresh cilantro stems and or cheese of choice
alternatives.recipe:
Dice the chicken into even small squares, bite-size. Keep in a bowl. Chop the lettuce and keep separated. Make sure you clean your cutting board between tasks to avoid cross-contamination of flavors.
Mix the marinade ingredients in a bowl and whisk to incorporate. A paste should form. Toss the diced chicken into the bowl and coat uniformly.
Spray a non-stick pan with spray oil and heat over medium heat. Once the pan is beginning to slightly smoke, add the chicken and heat up 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly. Keep warm.
Meanwhile, reheat your rice in two separate bowls for 2.5 minutes in the microwave.
In a plate or bowl, plate ⅓ cup of white rice next to ⅓ cup of brown rice. Weight 4.5 ounces of chicken per bowl, ¼ cup of pico de gallo, ¼ cup of romaine, ¼ fanned avocado, and 2 teaspoons of greek yogurt on top. Pick washed fresh cilantro and garnish.

alternatives.name: Fall Pomegranate Chicken Salad Recipe
ingredients: 16 ounces Trifecta chicken breast, diced into squares evenly
4 tablespoons pomegranate seeds, store-bought to save time
¼ cup Trifecta almonds, favorite kind
4 tablespoon Mustard Honey Vin, store-bought or home-made
alternatives.recipe:
Prepare all ingredients as indicated. In a big bowl, mix all greens together. Season with a sprinkle of kosher salt.
Portion 0.5 cup of green mix in each plate, ⅓ cup of quinoa, 4 ounces of diced chicken, sprinkle 1 tablespoon of pom seeds, followed by 1 tablespoon of almonds, and 1 tablespoon of crumbled feta cheese in the middle of the salad.
Dress the salad with 1 tablespoon of mustard honey vin. Taste for seasoning and add another sprinkle of salt to the salad to bring up the flavor of all the ingredients. Enjoy!
Conversely, feel free to mix each salad in a bowl following the same serving sizes.

alternatives.selected: Scallop Cerviche Recipe

alternatives.name: Turkey Sausage Frittata With Egg Whites Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Brown sausage in pan while thawing broccoli in the microwave
Mix together and season to taste
Place in 9x11 baking dish
Pour egg whites over almost to cover
Bake at 350-375 for approximately 40 minutes

alternatives.name: Lime BBQ Chicken With Salsa Cream Dipping Sauce Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Cube chicken
Place cilantro, minced garlic, lime zest, lime juice, olive oil, salt and pepper into a bowl and stir
Place cubed chicken into marinade, cover and refrigerate 30-60 minutes maximum (citrus starts breaking down protein after 60 minutes)
Combine 1 cup sour cream with 1 cup salsa for dipping sauce
Place chicken on 8 skewers and cook on grill
Serve with salsa cream dipping sauce

alternatives.name: Shrimp Stuffed Avocado Recipe
ingredients: 1 oz of Bolthouse Farms Cilantro Avocado Dressing
alternatives.recipe:
First, cut both avocados in half and remove the pit. Using a spoon, cut out additional avocado in the center to make room for more shrimp.
Heat up the Trifecta Shrimp for 2 minutes in the microwave.
Cut up the shrimp into pieces and add into the center of the avocados. Top with diced Roma tomatoes, diced jalapenos, and drizzle lightly with the Bolthouse Farms dressing.
Top with fresh cilantro. Enjoy!

ingredients: 0.25 cup no salt added black beans, drained and rinsed
0.25 cup red or green enchilada sauce

In a skillet over medium heat, saute ground beef until cooked

alternatives.selected: Paleo Spiced Roasted Butternut Squash Recipe

alternatives.name: Buffalo Chicken Meal Prep Recipe
ingredients: ½ cup Frank’s Red Hot sauce
alternatives.recipe:
Melt the butter in a medium saucepan over medium-low heat. Once fully melted, add the rest of the ingredients in the pot. Mix, taste, and adjust for seasoning if needed (unlikely as Frank’s is pretty salty as is). Bring to a gentle boil and let sauce slightly reduced.
Dice chicken into even bite-sized squares. Transfer chicken into the pot with sauce and bring up to heat until chicken is fully heated through. Reduce heat to low and keep covered until needed. Stir every now and then if for some reason you keep the pot on the fire for longer than 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat up Trifecta mashed potato and cauliflower in two separate microwave-safe bowls for 3 minutes. Add 30 seconds if the food is not heated all the way through.
As an idea: Plate ½ cup of mashed potatoes in each plate, topped by 4 ounces of chicken buffalo and ½ cup of the heated cauliflower. Feel free to sprinkle any leftover buffalo sauce on the cauliflower.

alternatives.name: Nutritious Hot Body Turkey Chili Recipe
ingredients: Himalayan salt and pepper to taste
alternatives.recipe:
Lightly spray frying pan with cooking spray
Add turkey and onions, crumble turkey and cook fully
Stir in remaining ingredients
Cover pot with lid
Continue to cook on low heat for 30 minutes

alternatives.name: Pulled BBQ Chicken Potato Skins Recipe
ingredients: 1 cup reduced fat shredded cheddar cheese
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 425 degrees
Rinse potatoes and pierce with a fork
Place potatoes on a baking sheet and bake for about 1 hour or until tender
While potatoes are cooking, boil chicken for about 8-10 minutes or until cooked through
When chicken is done, shred it by using 2 forks
Toss the chicken with the BBQ sauce and set aside
When potatoes are done, cut in half and scoop out the middle
Evenly divide the pulled BBQ chicken among the potatoes
Sprinkle with shredded cheddar cheese
Return to the oven and bake an additional 20 minutes until cheese is melted

alternatives.selected: Scrambled Eggs With Cheese Recipe

alternatives.name: Hearty Pumpkin Spice Protein Waffles Recipe
ingredients: 2 scoops snickerdoodle or vanilla whey protein powder
Additional Pumpkin Pie Spice as desired
alternatives.recipe:
Mix together all ingredients except syrup in a bowl
Allow batter to sit while waffle iron warms
Spray waffle iron with nonstick spray
Cook according to waffle iron directions

Transfer meat to a bowl and add in beans
Spread half the enchilada sauce on bottom of an oven safe dish
Divide the meat and bean mixture evenly down the middle of the 3 tortillas
Sprinkle with half the cheese
Roll up tightly and place seam side down in the dish
Spread remaining enchilada sauce on top
Sprinkle with remaining cheese
Bake for 10-12 minutes

alternatives.name: Easy Paleo Chili Beef Recipe
ingredients: 2 cups diced tomato, canned, juice drained and ¼ cup reserved.
alternatives.recipe:
Microwave the Trifecta beef patties covered completely by a damp paper cloth towel, for a minute and a half. Remove from microwave and after the patties are slightly cooled down, crumble the patties to its original form - ground beef - with your hands into a separate bowl. Keep warm.
Combine all the seasoning spice mix ingredients in a separate bowl, with the exception of salt.
Dice the onion and keep in a bowl. Heat oil over medium-high in a pot large enough to hold all ingredients. Once the oil is shimmering and slightly smoking, add the onions, mix constantly to prevent onions from burning. Reduce heat to medium and cook onions for 3-5 minutes or until they start to develop a caramelized color. Use your best judgment on the timing. Once some caramelization begins to happen, add bell peppers and garlic and mix to cook for 2 minutes, avoiding the garlic from burnin...
Add the spice mix to the pot and mix to fully coat all the vegetables. The point of this step is to bring the fragrant tones of the spices up. After a few seconds, add canned tomatoes by crushing them with your hand as you add them to the pot, or by crushing them with a wooden or metal spoon in the pot. Mix and scrape any brown bits from the pan. Add ¼ cup of tomato juice, plus water or stock and increase the heat to bring to a boil. Once boiling, reduce heat to medium-high and maintain an ag...
Immediately add the ground beef along with honey, and mix to incorporate. Bring the pot back up to an aggressive simmer, mixing constantly, for about 3 minutes or until beef is heated through. Add extra water or stock if the sauce is becoming too thick.
Taste for seasoning and adjust as needed. Use your best judgment in the heat adjustment.
Portion around 5-6 ounces of chili into 4 bowls. There may be excess chili as the volume increases with the addition of all other ingredients (so you may have to weigh a bit more than 6 ounces).
Garnish each bowl with your preferred condiments or garnishes (chives, cheese, tortilla strips, and even fried shallots are some of my favorites).

alternatives.name: Homemade High Protein White Cheddar Mac & Cheese Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 420 degrees
Cook pasta 2 minutes shy of directions
Drain pasta and return to pot
Add milk, seasonings, cottage cheese and Greek yogurt to pasta
Slowly mix in white cheddar cheese and half of parmesan
Pour pasta into an oven safe baking dish
Sprinkle with 2 tbsp of oat bran and remaining parmesan cheese
Bake until golden and bubbly

alternatives.selected: Protein Pumpkin Pancakes With Oats Recipe

alternatives.name: Kurt Weidner's Sweet Potato Waffles Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Add all ingredients into a blender
Blend until smooth
Pour mixture into a waffle maker, heat and serve

alternatives.name: High Protein Chocolate Peanut Butter Pancakes Recipe
ingredients: 1/4 cup oat flour or whole wheat flour
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat pan or griddle to medium/high heat
In a bowl mix flour, protein powder, cocoa powder, peanut flour, cinnamon, sweetener and baking powder
Add one egg yolk, milk and vanilla extract, stir until combined
In a separate bowl whisk three egg whites until stiff peaks
Gently fold egg whites into batter
Spoon batter onto preheated griddle to make about 6 medium sized pancakes
Cook until middles start to bubble then flip

alternatives.name: Snickerdoodle Pecan Protein French Toast Sticks
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
Cut each slice of bread into thirds.
Whisk together egg whites, milk, protein powder.
Coat each slice of bread in the egg mixture.
Bake for 9 minutes, flip, bake 9 more minutes.

alternatives.selected: Deep Dish Pepperoni Pizza Lasagna Recipe

alternatives.name: Protein Packed Grilled Steak Burrito Recipe
ingredients: 0.5 cup no salt black beans, drained
alternatives.recipe:
Season steak with salt and pepper
Grill steak until desired doneness
Cook brown rice according to package directions
When rice is done, add in pico de gallo and black beans
Layer bean and rice mixture down center of tortilla
Top with sliced steak
Finish off with a dollop of greek yogurt and cheese or avocado if desired
Roll up and enjoy

alternatives.name: High Protein Chicken Burrito Bowl Recipe
ingredients: 1/3 cup no salt added black beans
1/2 cup fresh pico de gallo or salsa
alternatives.recipe:
Toss cooked white rice with chopped cilantro, squeeze of lime juice and a pinch of salt
Toss chicken breast with your favorite Mexican seasoning and bake or grill as desired
Once chicken is done cooking, cut into bite size pieces
Warm your black beans in the microwave
Build your bowl - divide all ingredients between 2 bowls
Layer cilantro lime rice, shredded lettuce, chicken, beans, guacamole, pico de gallo, greek yogurt
Finish off with a sprinkle of cheddar cheese and a wedge of lime

alternatives.name: Bodybuilder's Double Beef & Bacon Cheeseburger Recipe
ingredients: 1 slice Reduced Fat White Cheddar Cheese
alternatives.recipe:
Combine ground beef and liquid smoke
Form beef into two even sized patties
Grill until about 1 minute before desired doneness
Add half slice of cheese to each burger and allow to melt
Cook bacon as desired
Place one burger on bottom of roll, followed by bacon, then remaining burger
Add condiments such as lettuce, tomato, ketchup, mustard, relish if desired

alternatives.selected: Jen Jewell's Bikini Booty Protein Smoothie Recipe

alternatives.name: High Protein Chipotle Cheddar Vegetarian Quesadilla Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Add sliced pepper, onion and mushroom to grill pan and grill until tender
Mix together cottage cheese and chipotle seasoning
Lay tortilla flat on grill
Spread half with cottage cheese mixture, add veggies, then top with cheddar cheese
Cook opened with grill cover down for 2 minutes
Fold tortilla over and flip gently
Cook another 1-2 minutes until cheese is melted
Slice and serve with salsa

alternatives.name: Blueberry Mug Cake Recipe With FitMiss Vanilla Chai
alternatives.recipe:
Blend all ingredients except blueberries until smooth.
Spray a bowl with non-stick oil, pour in batter.
Stir in blueberries.
Microwave for 2 minutes.
Pour frosting over cake.

alternatives.name: 3 Ingredient Chocolate Protein Mug Cake Recipe
ingredients: 1/2 tsp baking powder for oven option
alternatives.recipe:
Mix all ingredients in a large mug. Do not fill to the lid as it might spill over
Microwave for 1-2 minutes
Let cool before removing and enjoy

alternatives.selected: Tibs, Ethiopian Stir-Fried Beef or Venison

alternatives.name: Protein Packed Sweet Potato Shepherds Pie
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Add ground beef to a non stick skillet
Cook over medium heat
Once cooked, add in tomato paste, frozen veggies and seasonings as desired
Place mixture into a 9x13in oven safe dish
Spread mashed sweet potatoes over top
Sprinkle with paprika, if desired
Bake for approximately 35-40 minutes
Serve immediately

alternatives.name: Bodybuilders Lean Beef Enchiladas Recipes
ingredients: 0.25 cup no salt added black beans, drained and rinsed
0.25 cup red or green enchilada sauce
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
In a skillet over medium heat, saute ground beef until cooked
Add diced chiles, salt and pepper
Transfer meat to a bowl and add in beans
Spread half the enchilada sauce on bottom of an oven safe dish
Divide the meat and bean mixture evenly down the middle of the 3 tortillas
Sprinkle with half the cheese
Roll up tightly and place seam side down in the dish
Spread remaining enchilada sauce on top
Sprinkle with remaining cheese
Bake for 10-12 minutes

alternatives.name: High Protein Sriracha Chicken Cheese Fries Recipe
ingredients: 4 medium white or sweet potatoes, cut as desired
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 425 degrees
Coat oven safe pan with nonstick spray
Add potato slices to pan
Bake for approximately 20 minutes
While potatoes are baking, boil chicken until cooked through
Shred cooked chicken
Toss chicken with sriracha sauce
Remove fries from oven
Top with shredded chicken and cheese
Place back in oven about 6-7 minutes until cheese melts
Top with chives if desired
